name: Favorite Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 Cooking apples (Granny Smith, Winesap, Rome, Golden Delicious)
Egg for egg wash on crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 1 1/2 cups flour and 1/8 teaspoon salt.
2. Cut shortening into flour until mixture resembles small peas.
3. In a bowl, beat the egg; add cold water and vinegar. Stir into flour mixture with a fork to form a smooth dough. Handle briefly; too much work makes tough dough. Makes 3 crusts.
4. Freeze one pastry ball in a plastic bag for later use.
5. Roll out 2 crusts for the pie.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Line a 10-inch pie dish with pastry.
8. In a small bowl, combine sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt; sprinkle over apples.
9. Dot with butter.
10. Top with remaining crust.
11. For a solid crust, cut large decorative holes in the crust to allow steam to escape.
12. For a lattice crust, roll out pastry to fit top of pie, then cut into 3/4-inch wide strips.
13. Lay two horizontal strips; weave and lay down two vertical strips.
14. Continue weaving until filling is covered.
15. Cover edges with foil strips.
16. Bake for 40 minutes.
17. Remove foil; brush top crust with beaten egg and sprinkle with sugar.
18. Bake an additional 20-35 minutes, or until filling bubbles through the crust and crust is golden brown.
